name: jollimemory
description: AI development process auto-documentation tool - monorepo for CLI, VS Code extension and IntelliJ plugin

scripts.build: npm run build -w @jolli.ai/cli && npm run build -w vscode
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @jolli.ai/cli && npm run typecheck -w vscode
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @jolli.ai/cli && npm run lint -w vscode
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w @jolli.ai/cli && npm run lint:fix -w vscode
scripts.test: npm run test -w @jolli.ai/cli && npm run test -w vscode
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @jolli.ai/cli && npm run clean -w vscode
scripts.all: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test

author: Jolli
